channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Oil price update for July 17, 2026
item.description: Changes in oil prices affect energy costs and the price of everyday items. Here is why.

item.title: American workers retreat into silos; CEOs can bridge the gap
item.description: Also includes all the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

item.title: How Apollo-owned Michaels turned rivals' bankruptcies into growth
item.description: The arts and crafts retailer uses party supplies and fabric to end years of stagnation.

item.title: Predictions of the dollar's decline have persisted for 55 years. BCG says they remain exaggerated.
item.description: Many are writing off the dollar, but every rival currency faces even greater challenges than the U.S.
